params.name: jurisdiction
params.description: Filter by jurisdiction code such as US, US-CA, GB, or EU.

params.name: session
params.description: Filter by legislative session identifier.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by legislation status.

params.name: q
params.description: Full-text search query to filter results.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: updatedSince
params.description: Return only records updated after this ISO 8601 datetime.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of bills and legislative measures. Supports filtering by jurisdiction, session, status, keyword search, and other criteria. Results include both current and historical legislation from the US and international jurisdictions.

params.name: billId
params.description: The unique identifier of the bill.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific bill including its full text, sponsors, committee assignments, vote history, and current status.

params.name: q
params.description: Full-text search query to filter results.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of organizational issues used to track policy topics and legislative priorities within the FiscalNote platform.

params.name: issueId
params.description: The unique identifier of the issue.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific organizational issue including associated bills and labels.

params.name: q
params.description: Full-text search query to filter results.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of labels used to categorize and organize legislation and policy items within the organization.

params.name: labelId
params.description: The unique identifier of the label.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific label.

params.name: agency

params.name: updatedSince
params.description: Return only records updated after this ISO 8601 datetime.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of regulatory documents including proposed rules, final rules, and notices from government agencies.

info.name: FiscalNote Get regulatory document by ID

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the regulatory document.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific regulatory document including its full text, issuing agency, and comment period details.
